description: Google Cloud Batch is a managed Google Cloud service for scheduling, queueing, and running batch processing jobs on Google infrastructure. It lets users submit and manage compute workloads and related job resources such as tasks and operations.
summary: Google Cloud Batch exposes a REST API at `https://batch.googleapis.com/v1` and is also managed through the `gcloud batch` CLI; both use Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 credentials.
